title: monardella nana var. tenuiflora
intro: Monardella nana var. tenuiflora, also known as Purple Sage, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Monardella nana var. tenuiflora include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and can also be used fresh in cooking, particularly in traditional Native American cuisine.
